CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE - TRIAL COURTS
Off Calendar Feb-07-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Donna J. Hitchens, Clerk Nicole Adams, Reporter Patrick Heard

The following cases having been previously severed as to certain defendants by Judge Goldsmith will be set for trial on July 28, 2003 with the current Market Share Group. Any prior stipulations set forth will not apply to these newly severed defendants with respect to the trial setting.

316658 Overstreet
